sqlMap.select: select * from ClaimIncidentSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ClaimIncidentSuppKey, NameOfClaimantCi, IsClientCi, IsNonClientCi, IsThisClaimReportedCi, NameOfInsuranceCompanyCi, ReportedCiDate, ClaimNotifiedCiDate, AllegedErrorCiDate, NameOfFirmPersonnelCi, InsurerLossReserveCi, LastSettlementOfferCi, ClaimantLastDemandCi, ClosingCiDate, TotalClaimExpensesCi, DescOfClaimCi, StepsTakenToPreventClaimCi, CurrentStatus, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ClaimIncidentSupp where ClaimIncidentSuppKey = #ClaimIncidentSuppKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ClaimIncidentSupp set
NameOfClaimantCi = #NameOfClaimantCi# NameOfClaimantCi = null IsClientCi = #IsClientCi# IsClientCi = null IsNonClientCi = #IsNonClientCi# IsNonClientCi = null IsThisClaimReportedCi = #IsThisClaimReportedCi# IsThisClaimReportedCi = null NameOfInsuranceCompanyCi = #NameOfInsuranceCompanyCi# NameOfInsuranceCompanyCi = null ReportedCiDate = #ReportedCiDate# ReportedCiDate = null ClaimNotifiedCiDate = #ClaimNotifiedCiDate# ClaimNotifiedCiDate = null AllegedErrorCiDate = #AllegedErrorCiDate# AllegedErrorCiDate = null NameOfFirmPersonnelCi = #NameOfFirmPersonnelCi# NameOfFirmPersonnelCi = null InsurerLossReserveCi = #InsurerLossReserveCi# InsurerLossReserveCi = null LastSettlementOfferCi = #LastSettlementOfferCi# LastSettlementOfferCi = null ClaimantLastDemandCi = #ClaimantLastDemandCi# ClaimantLastDemandCi = null ClosingCiDate = #ClosingCiDate# ClosingCiDate = null TotalClaimExpensesCi = #TotalClaimExpensesCi# TotalClaimExpensesCi = null DescOfClaimCi = #DescOfClaimCi# DescOfClaimCi = null StepsTakenToPreventClaimCi = #StepsTakenToPreventClaimCi# StepsTakenToPreventClaimCi = null CurrentStatus = #CurrentStatus# CurrentStatus = null VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# VersionSequence = null PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# PolicyKey = null
where ClaimIncidentSuppKey = #ClaimIncidentSuppKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ClaimIncidentSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ClaimIncidentSuppKey, NameOfClaimantCi, IsClientCi, IsNonClientCi, IsThisClaimReportedCi, NameOfInsuranceCompanyCi, ReportedCiDate, ClaimNotifiedCiDate, AllegedErrorCiDate, NameOfFirmPersonnelCi, InsurerLossReserveCi, LastSettlementOfferCi, ClaimantLastDemandCi, ClosingCiDate, TotalClaimExpensesCi, DescOfClaimCi, StepsTakenToPreventClaimCi, CurrentStatus, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ClaimIncidentSupp where ClaimIncidentSuppKey = #ClaimIncidentSuppKey#

select ClaimIncidentSuppKey, NameOfClaimantCi, IsClientCi, IsNonClientCi, IsThisClaimReportedCi, NameOfInsuranceCompanyCi, ReportedCiDate, ClaimNotifiedCiDate, AllegedErrorCiDate, NameOfFirmPersonnelCi, InsurerLossReserveCi, LastSettlementOfferCi, ClaimantLastDemandCi, ClosingCiDate, TotalClaimExpensesCi, DescOfClaimCi, StepsTakenToPreventClaimCi, CurrentStatus from ClaimIncidentSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
